allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking gives auditability-traceability the machine-level view needed to connect outputs, levers, and responsibility into one inspectable chain.
allies.source_quote: Systems thinking focuses on interrelationships, feedback loops, and seeing patterns of change.

allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops make auditability-traceability useful over time by turning visible trails into diagnosis, correction, and learning rather than static records.
allies.source_quote: It facilitates building a synthesis of issues from specific data, allowing the organization to see patterns of mistakes.

allies.rationale_text: Constraints help auditability-traceability stay actionable by making boundaries, assumptions, and operating limits explicit inside the trail.
allies.source_quote: Explicit Workplanning ... including data sources and end products. This creates the definitive audit trail.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts auditability-traceability when the trail is built to justify a wanted answer instead of to expose how the judgment really formed.
antagonists.source_quote: The tendency to process information to get a conclusion we want, rather than discovering what is true, obscuring the objective audit trail.

antagonists.rationale_text: Simplification becomes an antagonist when it strips away the trail needed for others to reconstruct assumptions, changes, and failure points.
antagonists.source_quote: may communicate the "punchline" ... without providing the necessary concrete, traceable steps for action

structured_tensions.tension_text: Auditability-traceability conflicts with optionality when documentation overhead locks teams into a recorded path and discourages late-stage pivots.
structured_tensions.source_quote: auditability-traceability conflicts with optionality (optionality) when documentation overhead locks teams into a recorded path and discourages late-stage pivots.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Auditability-traceability conflicts with simplification when exhaustive traceability requirements add complexity that obscures the core decision logic.
structured_tensions.source_quote: auditability-traceability conflicts with simplification (simplification) when exhaustive traceability requirements add complexity that obscures the core decision logic.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strong on reconstructable causal trails, visible logic, and trust through inspectability, so the file preserves that bounded first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor documentation relations beyond the strongest current-vocabulary links around systems, feedback, constraints, and anti-distortion pressure.
open_questions: Delays pressure is source-real in the trust-before-action framing, but the retained set favors clearer direct current-vocabulary support.
